staging_sql: INSERT INTO staging.stg_customer (customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_customer_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_brand (brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_brand_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_collection (collection_id,brand_id,collection_name,launch_year,collection_status,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT collection_id,brand_id,collection_name,launch_year,collection_status,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_collection_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_watch_product (product_id,brand_id,collection_id,sku,product_name,watch_category,gender_category,movement_type,strap_material,dial_color,case_size_mm,water_resistance_metres,unit_price,warranty_months,product_status,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT product_id,brand_id,collection_id,sku,product_name,watch_category,gender_category,movement_type,strap_material,dial_color,case_size_mm,water_resistance_metres,unit_price,warranty_months,product_status,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_watch_product_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_warehouse (warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_warehouse_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_inventory (inventory_id,product_id,warehouse_id,inventory_date,on_hand_quantity,reserved_quantity,available_quantity,reorder_level,inventory_status,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT inventory_id,product_id,warehouse_id,inventory_date,on_hand_quantity,reserved_quantity,available_quantity,reorder_level,inventory_status,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_inventory_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_order (order_id,customer_id,order_date,order_status,order_channel,gross_order_amount,discount_amount,net_order_amount,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT order_id,customer_id,order_date,order_status,order_channel,gross_order_amount,discount_amount,net_order_amount,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_order_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_order_item (order_item_id,order_id,product_id,warehouse_id,quantity,unit_price,gross_line_amount,line_discount_amount,line_net_amount,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT order_item_id,order_id,product_id,warehouse_id,quantity,unit_price,gross_line_amount,line_discount_amount,line_net_amount,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_order_item_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_payment (payment_id,order_id,payment_date,payment_method,payment_transaction_type,payment_status,payment_amount,transaction_reference,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT payment_id,order_id,payment_date,payment_method,payment_transaction_type,payment_status,payment_amount,transaction_reference,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_payment_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_shipment (shipment_id,order_id,warehouse_id,tracking_number,courier_partner,shipment_date,promised_delivery_date,actual_delivery_date,shipment_status,delivery_delay_days,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT shipment_id,order_id,warehouse_id,tracking_number,courier_partner,shipment_date,promised_delivery_date,actual_delivery_date,shipment_status,delivery_delay_days,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_shipment_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_return_request (return_id,order_item_id,return_quantity,return_reason,return_status,requested_date,approved_date,refund_date,refund_amount,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT return_id,order_item_id,return_quantity,return_reason,return_status,requested_date,approved_date,refund_date,refund_amount,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_return_request_raw;

INSERT INTO staging.stg_warranty_claim (warranty_claim_id,order_item_id,claim_reason,claim_status,claim_date,service_start_date,service_completion_date,service_cost_amount,resolution_description,source_file,loaded_at) SELECT warranty_claim_id,order_item_id,claim_reason,claim_status,claim_date,service_start_date,service_completion_date,service_cost_amount,resolution_description,source_file,loaded_at FROM raw_load.load_warranty_claim_raw;
dimension_sql: WITH dates AS (SELECT inventory_date AS full_date FROM staging.stg_inventory UNION SELECT order_date FROM staging.stg_order UNION SELECT payment_date FROM staging.stg_payment UNION SELECT shipment_date FROM staging.stg_shipment UNION SELECT promised_delivery_date FROM staging.stg_shipment UNION SELECT actual_delivery_date FROM staging.stg_shipment WHERE actual_delivery_date IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT requested_date FROM staging.stg_return_request UNION SELECT approved_date FROM staging.stg_return_request WHERE approved_date IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT refund_date FROM staging.stg_return_request WHERE refund_date IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT claim_date FROM staging.stg_warranty_claim UNION SELECT service_start_date FROM staging.stg_warranty_claim WHERE service_start_date IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT service_completion_date FROM staging.stg_warranty_claim WHERE service_completion_date IS NOT NULL) INSERT INTO dimensional.dim_date (date_key,full_date,day_of_week,day_name,month_number,month_name,quarter_number,calendar_year,is_weekend) SELECT to_char(full_date,'YYYYMMDD')::integer,full_date,extract(isodow FROM full_date)::smallint,trim(to_char(full_date,'Day')),extract(month FROM full_date)::smallint,trim(to_char(full_date,'Month')),extract(quarter FROM full_date)::smallint,extract(year FROM full_date)::integer,extract(isodow FROM full_date) IN (6,7) FROM dates;

INSERT INTO dimensional.dim_customer (customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active) SELECT customer_id,customer_name,email,phone,city,region,customer_segment,signup_date,is_active FROM staging.stg_customer;
INSERT INTO dimensional.dim_brand (brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active) SELECT brand_id,brand_name,country_of_origin,brand_tier,is_active FROM staging.stg_brand;

INSERT INTO dimensional.dim_collection (collection_id,brand_key,collection_name,launch_year,collection_status) SELECT c.collection_id,b.brand_key,c.collection_name,c.launch_year,c.collection_status FROM staging.stg_collection c JOIN dimensional.dim_brand b ON b.brand_id=c.brand_id;

INSERT INTO dimensional.dim_product (product_id,brand_key,collection_key,sku,product_name,watch_category,gender_category,movement_type,strap_material,dial_color,case_size_mm,water_resistance_metres,list_unit_price,warranty_months,product_status) SELECT p.product_id,b.brand_key,c.collection_key,p.sku,p.product_name,p.watch_category,p.gender_category,p.movement_type,p.strap_material,p.dial_color,p.case_size_mm,p.water_resistance_metres,p.unit_price,p.warranty_months,p.product_status FROM staging.stg_watch_product p JOIN dimensional.dim_brand b ON b.brand_id=p.brand_id JOIN dimensional.dim_collection c ON c.collection_id=p.collection_id AND c.brand_key=b.brand_key;

INSERT INTO dimensional.dim_warehouse (warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active) SELECT warehouse_id,warehouse_name,city,region,warehouse_type,is_active FROM staging.stg_warehouse;
fact_sql: INSERT INTO dimensional.fact_sales (order_item_id,order_id,order_date_key,customer_key,product_key,warehouse_key,order_status,order_channel,quantity,unit_price,gross_line_amount,line_discount_amount,line_net_amount) SELECT i.order_item_id,i.order_id,d.date_key,c.customer_key,p.product_key,w.warehouse_key,o.order_status,o.order_channel,i.quantity,i.unit_price,i.gross_line_amount,i.line_discount_amount,i.line_net_amount FROM staging.stg_order_item i JOIN staging.stg_order o ON o.order_id=i.order_id JOIN dimensional.dim_date d ON d.full_date=o.order_date JOIN dimensional.dim_customer c ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id JOIN dimensional.dim_product p ON p.product_id=i.product_id JOIN dimensional.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id=i.warehouse_id;

INSERT INTO dimensional.fact_inventory_snapshot (inventory_id,inventory_date_key,product_key,warehouse_key,on_hand_quantity,reserved_quantity,available_quantity,reorder_level,inventory_status) SELECT i.inventory_id,d.date_key,p.product_key,w.warehouse_key,i.on_hand_quantity,i.reserved_quantity,i.available_quantity,i.reorder_level,i.inventory_status FROM staging.stg_inventory i JOIN dimensional.dim_date d ON d.full_date=i.inventory_date JOIN dimensional.dim_product p ON p.product_id=i.product_id JOIN dimensional.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id=i.warehouse_id;

INSERT INTO dimensional.fact_payment (payment_id,order_id,payment_date_key,customer_key,payment_method,payment_transaction_type,payment_status,payment_amount,transaction_reference,order_channel) SELECT p.payment_id,p.order_id,d.date_key,c.customer_key,p.payment_method,p.payment_transaction_type,p.payment_status,p.payment_amount,p.transaction_reference,o.order_channel FROM staging.stg_payment p JOIN staging.stg_order o ON o.order_id=p.order_id JOIN dimensional.dim_date d ON d.full_date=p.payment_date JOIN dimensional.dim_customer c ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id;

INSERT INTO dimensional.fact_shipment (shipment_id,order_id,shipment_date_key,promised_date_key,actual_delivery_date_key,customer_key,warehouse_key,tracking_number,courier_partner,shipment_status,delivery_delay_days) SELECT s.shipment_id,s.order_id,sd.date_key,pd.date_key,ad.date_key,c.customer_key,w.warehouse_key,s.tracking_number,s.courier_partner,s.shipment_status,s.delivery_delay_days FROM staging.stg_shipment s JOIN staging.stg_order o ON o.order_id=s.order_id JOIN dimensional.dim_date sd ON sd.full_date=s.shipment_date JOIN dimensional.dim_date pd ON pd.full_date=s.promised_delivery_date LEFT JOIN dimensional.dim_date ad ON ad.full_date=s.actual_delivery_date JOIN dimensional.dim_customer c ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id JOIN dimensional.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id=s.warehouse_id;

INSERT INTO dimensional.fact_return (return_id,order_item_id,order_id,requested_date_key,approved_date_key,refund_date_key,customer_key,product_key,return_quantity,return_reason,return_status,refund_amount) SELECT r.return_id,r.order_item_id,i.order_id,rd.date_key,ad.date_key,fd.date_key,c.customer_key,p.product_key,r.return_quantity,r.return_reason,r.return_status,r.refund_amount FROM staging.stg_return_request r JOIN staging.stg_order_item i ON i.order_item_id=r.order_item_id JOIN staging.stg_order o ON o.order_id=i.order_id JOIN dimensional.dim_date rd ON rd.full_date=r.requested_date LEFT JOIN dimensional.dim_date ad ON ad.full_date=r.approved_date LEFT JOIN dimensional.dim_date fd ON fd.full_date=r.refund_date JOIN dimensional.dim_customer c ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id JOIN dimensional.dim_product p ON p.product_id=i.product_id;

INSERT INTO dimensional.fact_warranty_claim (warranty_claim_id,order_item_id,order_id,claim_date_key,service_start_date_key,service_completion_date_key,customer_key,product_key,claim_reason,claim_status,service_cost_amount,resolution_days,resolution_description) SELECT wc.warranty_claim_id,wc.order_item_id,i.order_id,cd.date_key,sd.date_key,fd.date_key,c.customer_key,p.product_key,wc.claim_reason,wc.claim_status,wc.service_cost_amount,CASE WHEN wc.service_start_date IS NOT NULL AND wc.service_completion_date IS NOT NULL THEN wc.service_completion_date-wc.service_start_date ELSE NULL END,wc.resolution_description FROM staging.stg_warranty_claim wc JOIN staging.stg_order_item i ON i.order_item_id=wc.order_item_id JOIN staging.stg_order o ON o.order_id=i.order_id JOIN dimensional.dim_date cd ON cd.full_date=wc.claim_date LEFT JOIN dimensional.dim_date sd ON sd.full_date=wc.service_start_date LEFT JOIN dimensional.dim_date fd ON fd.full_date=wc.service_completion_date JOIN dimensional.dim_customer c ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id JOIN dimensional.dim_product p ON p.product_id=i.product_id;
assumptions: All records are fictional synthetic demonstration data.
The six distinct calendar dates used by events span 40 days inclusively from 2026-05-01 through 2026-06-10 and produce exactly six dim_date rows.
Exact requested raw-table and downstream table counts take precedence over the narrative preference that returns and warranty claims represent only a minority of order items.
Each order has three order-item rows; customers, products, warehouses, brands, and collections are reused non-uniformly.
Order totals are reconciled from order-item gross amounts, discounts, and net amounts.
All referenced return and warranty order items belong to orders whose generated shipment status is Delivered.
Successful payment amounts equal and therefore do not exceed their related order net amounts.
Surrogate identity columns are omitted from dimension and fact INSERT column lists so PostgreSQL generates them.
Transformation statements assume execution in staging_sql order, then dimension_sql order, then fact_sql order against initially empty target tables.
